name: Multiple Locks of a Critical Resource
description: The product locks a critical resource more times than intended, potentially causing deadlocks with binary locks or resource pool depletion with counting semaphores, leading to denial of service or unexpected system states.
detection_pattern: CONTROL(lock_acquire) is called multiple times on the same STORAGE(shared_resource) without intervening CONTROL(lock_release). Look for re-entrant lock acquisition paths where a thread already holding a lock attempts to acquire it again.
